title: Valgrind warning if PK has more columns than the table.
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, PRIMARY KEY(a,a COLLATE NOCASE)) WITHOUT ROWID;
key_bug_features: Primary key with more columns than the table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(a, b COLLATE NOCASE)) WITHOUT ROWID;
CREATE TABLE t2(c INT, d REAL, PRIMARY KEY(c, d)) WITHOUT ROWID;
